response.justification: Candidate has a long, diverse engineering history but the resume shows no meaningful Java/Kotlin/Spring/JVM work. Java appears only briefly in older robotics/orchestration contexts, and there is no evidence of IDE internals, language tooling, or enterprise framework expertise. Recent experience is centered on TypeScript/Node, DLang, and AI tooling — a poor match for a Senior IDE/JVM role focused on Spring, Quarkus, Hibernate, and application servers.
strengths: Long track record on complex, large-scale systems across multiple stacks
Past C/C++ contributions to LabWindows/CVI — some IDE-adjacent exposure
Strong craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, pairing, workshops)
concerns: No demonstrated Spring/Quarkus/Hibernate or modern JVM ecosystem experience
Kotlin is entirely absent from the resume
No evidence of IDE internals, language tooling, or compiler/parsing work

key_factors.factor: No Kotlin or recent Java work
Prior IDE-adjacent C/C++ work at National Instruments
